title: Exceptions
doc_html:
§1474. Exceptions

            The provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to networks that are open and available for public access.

            Acts 2023, No. 308, §1, eff. June 13, 2023.
doc_text:
§1474.  Exceptions
The provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to networks that are open and available
for public access.
Acts 2023, No. 308, §1, eff. June 13, 2023.
